guide.uploadDescription: Upload your CSV to StriveFormats for instant validation, auto-fixes, and a clean export.
guide.importBlockerNote: your file will fail to import until this is resolved.
guide.autoFixable: Auto-fixable: this issue is corrected automatically when you click Fix Issues.

guides.title: CSV Import Guides
guides.description: Step-by-step guides for fixing Shopify, WooCommerce, Etsy, eBay, and Amazon CSV import errors. Learn header rules, encoding, quoting, and platform-specific requirements.
guides.needHelpDesc: Upload your CSV and let the fixer validate, score, and auto-fix safe issues before you import.
guides.generalGuidesDesc: General CSV guides for encoding, headers, quoting, line endings, and common import mistakes.
guides.platformGuidesDesc: guides covering every validation issue for CSV imports.

common.popularGuidesDesc: Step-by-step guides for the most common CSV import problems.
common.platformFixersDesc: Dedicated validation guides for each ecommerce platform.

home.title: StriveFormats | Clean. Standardize. Validate.
home.description: Fix and convert messy CSV files for Shopify and other tools. Upload, auto-fix safe issues, and export clean files in seconds.
home.headline: Clean. Standardize. Validate.
home.heroSubtitle: Fix broken ecommerce CSVs fast. Auto-fix what is safe, flag what is risky, and export a clean file you can trust.
home.whatItDoesBullet1: Fix common CSV issues that break ecommerce imports
home.whatItDoesBullet2: Normalize formatting such as spacing, casing, and numeric fields
home.whatItDoesBullet3: Manually edit problem cells and export a clean CSV
home.fixInSeconds: Fix ecommerce CSV files in seconds
home.fixInSecondsDesc: Choose a platform, upload your CSV, and let the tool auto-fix safe issues. Review anything risky, then export a clean file.
home.saveReuseDesc: Create reusable formats with column templates and rules. Perfect for repeat tasks like Shopify exports.
home.faq1Q: Do you upload my CSV to a server?
home.faq1A: The fixer runs in your browser for the core parsing and edits. When you export, your cleaned CSV is generated locally.
home.faq2Q: What kinds of problems can it fix automatically?
home.faq2A: Safe fixes include trimming extra spaces, normalizing empty cells, and applying consistent formatting. Anything that could change meaning is flagged so you can review it before export.
home.faq3A: Custom Formats let you save reusable column templates and cleanup rules so repeat jobs take seconds. Advanced plan is required for creating and managing formats.
home.faq4Q: Can I cancel or change plans later?
home.faq4A: Yes. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel from your Profile at any time.
home.upgradeModalMessage: Custom Formats are available on the Advanced plan. Upgrade to create and manage reusable CSV formats.

presets.title: Preset Formats
presets.description: Browse ecommerce CSV templates for Shopify, WooCommerce, Etsy, Amazon, and eBay. Preview columns, download samples, and open the fixer with a preset selected.
presets.noColumns: This preset does not expose a fixed column list yet.
presets.showingColumns: Showing 12 columns for readability. Download the sample CSV for the full header set.
presets.desc_shopify_products: Validate and auto-fix Shopify product CSVs. Focused on import blockers, variant structure, pricing, inventory, and consistent formatting.
presets.desc_woocommerce_products: Clean WooCommerce product templates: required fields, pricing formats, SKUs, categories, and common import mistakes.
presets.desc_woocommerce_variable_products: WooCommerce variable products + variations (auto-creates missing parent rows and validates variation structure).
presets.desc_etsy_listings: Prepare Etsy listing CSVs with cleaner structure, required fields, and safer formatting for uploads.
presets.desc_amazon_inventory_loader: Normalize Amazon inventory loader style templates by validating essentials like SKU, item name, quantity, and price.
presets.desc_ebay_listings: Fix common eBay listing CSV issues: missing IDs, invalid values, broken URLs, and inconsistent pricing or quantity fields.
presets.desc_ebay_variations: Validate eBay variation listing CSVs: variation specifics pairing, duplicate variation combos, price and quantity fields.

convert.title: CSV Format Converter
convert.description: Convert between Shopify, WooCommerce, Etsy, eBay, and Amazon CSV formats. Fields that cannot map perfectly are flagged as warnings.
convert.uploadDesc: Upload the file you want to convert.
convert.allMapped: All source fields mapped successfully. Output should be import-ready.
convert.convertedWithWarnings: Converted with warnings — review dropped columns before importing.
convert.droppedColumns: Dropped columns (no equivalent in target format)

merge.title: CSV Merger & Deduplicator
merge.description: Combine two CSV files and optionally remove duplicates based on a shared column.
merge.noSharedColumns: No shared columns found. All columns from both files will appear.

app.title: CSV Fixer
app.subtitle: Pick a format, upload your CSV, auto-fix safe issues, and export.
app.limitReached: Monthly export limit reached. Upgrade to continue.
app.autoFixHelp: We'll auto-fix safe issues. Anything risky stays in the table for manual edits.
app.editHelp: Click a cell in the table to edit it. Red and yellow highlight errors and warnings.
app.builtInFormats: Built-in formats are available to everyone.
app.customFormatsHere: Custom formats appear here when you save or import them.
app.noAutoFixes: No auto fixes were applied for this upload.
